_comment: Additional Stremio subtitle display strings introduced in v1.5.3.

messages.config.otherSettings.mobileMode.label: Mobile Mode (complete delivery)
messages.config.otherSettings.mobileMode.descript: Waits for the complete translation before responding to Stremio on Android/iOS. Duplicate requests share the same job, and reopening the stream receives a fresh URL after completion.
messages.config.otherSettings.mobileMode.timeoutD: This limits the whole translation wait, independently from an individual AI request timeout. Long waits require a reverse proxy that permits long-running responses.
messages.subtitle.mobileTimeoutBody: The translation continues in the background. Reopen the video or subtitle list, then select the same numbered entry again.
